knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Fall transition signals: cooling nights drop water temps below summer highs, baitfish begin transitioning. Watch for pods schooling near surface, shad flipping on top, dive-bombing gulls, multiple herons on points or in creek backs. On natural lakes, bluegills transition from bottom to surface — bass may be on top of grass or suspended around deep humps, feeding UP not on bottom. Switch from bottom-bouncing to mid-range presentations.'
